headline: Lennar and D.R. Horton Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after the renewed Middle East tensions pushed Treasury yields back toward nine-month highs, threatening to drive 30-year mortgage rates higher and further damage already-fragile buyer demand.

headline: Wall Street Soars While Main Street Suffers
summary: The economy and markets are highly bifurcated, with wealth and asset appreciation concentrated among the upper echelon. Click here to learn more.
